title: CAREwell
text:
CAREwell - SupportGoWhere
CAREwell
Share link
CAREwell is a program that supports caregivers in their caregiving role, emotional and mental wellness, decision- making regarding services, and care management.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Each family is guided by a transdisciplinary CAREwell Key Worker.
CAREwell Key Workers meet with caregiver for needs analysis and establish family support plan.
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

CAREwell offers tailored support to caregivers through a combination of approaches:

Trauma-informed emotional support and mental health advisory for caregivers

Professional support on service navigation, care coordination, and service integration for meeting dependent and family’s social and health needs.




Each family is paired with a Keyworker, a trained professional in social work, healthcare, special needs, or related fields. The Keyworker will work with the caregiver to assess needs and identify challenges, establish a family support plan, and implement strategies to support both the caregiver and their dependent.

Who is this for?

CAREwell program is a highly subsidised program made affordable to all caregivers of persons with special needs.




Interested caregivers are encouraged to get in touch with us to find out the eligible subsidies available to them.

How to apply?

Interested caregivers or external agency can click on the request link for CAREwell. For caregivers, you will receive an email with a link to ‘CSG Caregiver Needs Form’. Fill in the form and our team will contact you shortly.




Applicants to CAREwell are screened for suitability before being enrolled into the programme.

Where can I find help?

https://caring.sg/carewell

https://www.caring.sg/contact-us
